text: Hi Ayesha, I have finished reviewing the inventory transfer plan and I just wanted to record a quick video to walk you through what I have done and yeah what I have added basically so that it's easy for you to understand. It will be quicker. So all I have done is added my comment to the last column. So that is column T for the US and column Y for Canada. And for the US I have added one more comment here. I couldn't find this key you in the plan or the forecast. So probably something that we need to look at for some of the items. Along with suggesting if we should send more or in some cases no need to send. I have also suggested that we review forecasts for some of the items that are that looks like that are doing better than what we forecasted. And I have compared those numbers with the future forecast. So that's how I know that we need to review them. Yeah. So that's all I have done. Let me know what you think about it if you and if you have any questions. Thank you. Bye.
